ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number of the performance data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score for the project in the given generation */,
  "raw_scores" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of raw scores for the project */,
  "own_score" REAL /* Own score for the project in the given generation */,
  "minimum_score" REAL /* Minimum score among the raw scores */,
  "maximum_score" REAL /* Maximum score among the raw scores */,
  "average_of_scores" REAL /* Average of the raw scores */,
  "sum_of_scores" REAL /* Sum of the raw scores */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "score_version" TEXT /* Version of the score data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the score */,
  "score_source" TEXT /* Source of the score data (e.g., automated system, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_generation FOREIGN KEY ("generation") REFERENCES generations ("generation_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the project manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the project manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the project manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES department ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Number of the generation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the generation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the generation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the generation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the generation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the generation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance score being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance score */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES performance_scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the metric for weighted scoring */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric to indicate performance levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-metric link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the project */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric value (e.g., automated system, manual entry) */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Main phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)
